headline: Best Buy: Shaky Fundamentals, Attractive Dividends, But The Real Upside May Be If They Are Taken Over
summary: Best Buy's speculative upside exists from takeover rumors involving GameStop, but this remains highly uncertain. Read why BBY stock is a hold.
